message:
deps(frankensearch): bump db7530e5 → 3dbab624 (0.1.0 → 0.3.0) + sha2 hex::encode migration

Pulls in the ort 2.0.0-rc.12 API fix landed in frankensearch 4ef8e090
("feat(rerank+ops+fsfs): ... update ort API ...") together with the
0.1.0 → 0.3.0 version bump from 3dbab624. Our Cargo.toml pins
`version = "*"` so the minor-version delta is accepted by cargo; the
build-time contract in build.rs is the authoritative pin, so it has
been updated in lockstep.

Source changes:
- build.rs: CONTRACTS entry for frankensearch updated —
    expected_rev:     db7530e5 → 3dbab624
    expected_version: 0.1.0    → 0.3.0
  with an inline comment pinning the why (pick up ort 2.0.0-rc.12 fix)
  so a future agent doesn't "revert to the last known-good rev".
- Cargo.toml: same rev bump (db7530e5 → 3dbab624) in the git dep line.
- Cargo.lock: transitive resolution delta flowing from the frankensearch
  upgrade and the sha2 0.11 inclusion; no manual edits.

hex::encode migration (forced by sha2 ≥ 0.11):
  sha2 0.11 removed the `LowerHex` impl on the GenericArray `Output`
  returned by `finalize()`, so `format!("{:x}", hasher.finalize())` no
  longer compiles. Replace all four remaining call sites with
  `hex::encode(hasher.finalize())`, which produces byte-identical
  lowercase-hex output — no wire-format change, no migration risk.

  - src/pages/bundle.rs: build_integrity_entry (full SHA-256 per file)
    and compute_fingerprint (first-16-char fingerprint over the manifest)
  - src/pages/export.rs: PathMode::Hash path-hash (first 16 chars)
  - src/pages/verify.rs: compute_file_hash streaming file hash

Each call site carries a one-line comment explaining the switch so we
don't see the same "why did you change this?" question when this
codebase is read again in six months.
